name: Phoenix.Channel.Helpers

values.name: assignResponseType
values.comment: Converts a string into a Msg

name: Phoenix.Channel.Update

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment:
- SuccessfulResponse is only triggered when "ok" is the status
  - ErrorResponse is everything else

values.name: update
values.comment: Take a msg from a channel, and update the model based on the msg recieved
values.type: Msg -> Model a -> ( Model a, Cmd Msg )

name: Phoenix.Channel.Model

aliases.name: MessageToSend
aliases.comment: Like a socket message, but comes with a pre-encoded payload
aliases.type: { topic : String, ref : Int, payload : Value, event : String }

aliases.name: Model
aliases.comment:
We demand that any model must store the socket events, the current refNumber, and
the state of connection
aliases.type: { a | socketEvents : List SocketMessage, refNumber : Int, connected : Bool, socketUrl : String }

aliases.name: ResponsePayload
aliases.comment: The status of the response paired with the response itself

aliases.name: SocketMessage
aliases.comment:
Each socket response has the topic (room) as a string, along with a ref count
    the event to trigger, and the payload of what the server actually sent
aliases.type: { topic : String, ref : Int, payload : ResponsePayload, event : String }
